name: reimport_files
short_description: Reimport files when they are found out-of-date
full_help:
reimport_files

Description: 
Reimport files when they are found out-of-date

Syntax: 
reimport_files  [-force] [-quiet] [-verbose] [<files>...]

Returns: 
list of file objects that were imported

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-force]    Force a reimport to happen even when the local files may be 
              newer
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution
  [<files>]   List of files to reimport. If no files are specified, all files
              in the project that are out-of-date, will be reimported

Categories: 
Project

arguments.description: Force a reimport to happen even when the local files may be newer
Suspend message limits during command execution
